schedulesPanel.title: Ayyukan da aka tsara
schedulesPanel.noJobs: Babu ayyukan cabinet da aka saita tukuna.
schedulesPanel.noHeartbeats: Babu bugun zuciya da aka saita tukuna.

scheduleTab.explainer1: Duk abin da ƙungiyar ku ke yi wannan makon, a kan kalanda ɗaya. Ruwan hoda bugun zuciya ne, kore kuma aiki ne na yau da kullum. Danna kowace alama don gyara ta.
scheduleTab.explainer2: Yi amfani da wannan shafin don gano rikice-rikice, gano lokutan hutu, ko kuma kawai ka gani nan take yadda ƙungiyar ke aiki.

helpPage.title: Taimako
helpPage.heading: Koyi yadda Cabinet ke aiki
helpPage.subheading: Gajerun nunawa, jagorori, da samfoti don samun mafi kyawun amfani daga Cabinet.
helpPage.discordHeading: Ba ka sami abin da kake nema ba?
helpPage.discordSubheading: Muna kan Discord — zo ka gaishe mu, ka yi tambayoyi, ka raba abin da kake ginawa.

tour.title: Haɗu da <accent>Cabinet</accent> ɗinka.
tour.description: Ƙungiyar AI ɗinka. Tushen iliminka. Wuri ɗaya.

agents.title: Ƙungiyar <accent>AI</accent> ɗinka.
agents.description: Ɗauki shugabanni da ƙwararru. Raba su zuwa sassa. Bari su raba ayyuka tsakaninsu.

tasks.title: Allon <accent>ayyuka</accent>.
tasks.description: Kanban, jeri, da kallon jadawali. Tace ta wakili ko matsayi. Zaɓi lokacin gudu ga kowane aiki.

knowledge.title: Tushen <accent>iliminka</accent>.
knowledge.description: Markdown, CSV, PDF, code, notebooks, mermaid, hotuna, sauti — komai yana bayyana kai tsaye. Bayananka yana kan na'urarka; naka ne, ba namu ba.

cabinets.title: Ƙungiyar <accent>ƙungiyoyin AI</accent>.
cabinets.description: Cabinets suna cikin cabinets. Kowane ɗaya ƙungiyar AI ce ta kansa tare da bayanansa, wakilai, da iyakokin gani — kuma suna iya haɗin gwiwa sama da ƙasa a cikin bishiyar.

routines.title: <accent>Ayyukan yau da kullun</accent> & jadawali.
routines.description: Gudanar da aiki kullum da ƙarfe 9 na safe, mako-mako ranar Juma'a, ko sau ɗaya Litinin mai zuwa. Cron, kalanda, ko harshen halitta.

conversations.title: Tattaunawa & <accent>amincewa</accent>.
conversations.description: Wakilai suna ba da shawarar ayyuka — fara aiki, tsara aiki — kuma kai ka amince kafin komai ya fara aiki.

themes.title: Mai da shi <accent>naka</accent>.
themes.description: Zaɓi daga zaɓaɓɓun jigogi masu haske da duhu — Paper, Slate, Claude, Ink, da sauransu.

providers.title: <accent>BYOAI</accent> — kawo AI ɗinka.
providers.description: Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, Codex, Cursor — kawo duk masu samarwa da kake biya. Zaɓi tsoho, ko canza shi ga kowane aiki.

shortcuts.title: Gajerun hanyoyin <accent>madannai</accent>.
shortcuts.description: Duk gajerun hanyoyin Cabinet a katin bincike ɗaya. Danna ? daga ko'ina don sake buɗe shi. Tace ta suna ko maɓalli — yana aiki don kewayawa, gyarawa, ayyuka, panels, da umarnin slash.

skills.title: <accent>Ƙwarewa</accent> ga wakilanka.
skills.description: Ƙwarewar Wakili Mai Sauƙin Shigarwa — littattafan jagora da samfurin ke amfani da su don aiki. Shigar daga GitHub ko skills.sh, haɗa zuwa wani mutum, ko @-ambato ɗaya a kowane mai rubutu don gudu ɗaya.

apiKeysItem.title: Maɓallan <accent>API</accent> don kayan aikinka.
apiKeysItem.description: Haɗa asusunka na OpenAI, Anthropic, ko GitHub sau ɗaya — kowane wakili da ƙwarewa a cikin Cabinet zai yi amfani da shi. Kai ne ke biyan kuɗinka, amfani da rabonka, babu mai shiga tsakani.

integrations.title: Sabobin <accent>MCP</accent> & haɗin kai.
integrations.description: Sabobin MCP, Slack, Telegram, Gmail, da Calendar OAuth — haɗa sau ɗaya kuma Cabinet zai sarrafa alamomin. Zai zo nan ba da jimawa ba.

updateSummaryPlus.dirtyDetected: An gano canje-canjen lambar app na gida

logsPanel.noEvents: Babu abubuwan da suka faru tukuna.

slideDataCopy.paragraphPrefix: Markdown, PDFs, spreadsheets, slides, images, video, audio, linked repos, embedded web apps, Google Docs. Ka ambaci kowane ɗayansu da
slideDataCopy.secondParagraphPrefix: Wuri ɗaya don komai — don haka kai da ƙungiyar AI ɗinka ku karanta, gyara, kuma ku tura daga

slideData.thailandCaption: Duba duk fayilolinka a wuri ɗaya.
slideData.taxCaption: Haraji 2026 — manhajar kalkuleta ta yanar gizo mai rai, an saka ta kai tsaye a cikin cabinet ɗinka.
slideData.healthCaption: Bitamin & dakunan gwaje-gwaje — takardar bayanai da ke jin kamar shafi.
slideData.repoCaption: Codebases — haɗa kowane Git repo, wanda wakilanka za su iya bincika.

slideTasks.typedCommand: Gudanar da ayyuka 10, kowannensu yana rubuta waƙa, adana zuwa @Songs/
slideTasks.paragraphPrefix: Rubuta aiki. Gudanar da ɗaya, gudanar da goma, tsara su har abada. Ka ambaci shafuka da
slideTasks.paragraphSuffix: , adana fitarwa duk inda kake so. Kai ne darakta yanzu.

slideAgents.personaBody: "Manazarci mai zurfi. Yana kawo hujjoji. Yana nuna sabanin bayanai."
slideAgents.jobsBody: Litinin 9:00 · Takaitaccen bayanin masu fafatawa na mako-mako
slideAgents.paragraphSuffix: . Wakilan AI ɗinka suna kammala aiki, awanni 24/7. Ka zama ɗan Adam — za su kula da sauran.

feedback.rolePlaceholder: misali, mai kirkira mai zaman kansa, PM a SaaS, dalibin zane, mai sha'awa…
feedback.howGoing: Yaya abubuwa ke tafiya kawo yanzu?
feedback.starTooltipUnknown: Ba Cabinet tauraro a GitHub — idan yana da amfani a gare ka, tauraro yana taimakawa sosai
feedback.starTooltipWithCount: {{count}} taurarin GitHub — danna don ƙara naka
feedback.discordCta: Kana so ka yi magana kai tsaye, ko ka yi hira da sauran membobin Cabinet?
feedback.thanksBody: Ra'ayoyin ka ne ke tsara abin da za a gina gaba.
feedback.copy2Lead: Ka buɗe Cabinet sau da yawa. Na gode! Cabinet buɗaɗɗen tushe ne kuma yana farawa, don haka abin da ka faɗa a nan yana canza abin da za a gina gaba.
feedback.copy2Q1: Mene ne kake ƙoƙarin yi a Cabinet yau?
feedback.copy2Q1Hint: Jumla ɗaya ya isa. Abin da ka buɗe shi don, ba abin da kake fata zai iya yi ba.
feedback.copy2Q2: A lokacin da ka so yin hakan, mene ne ka yi amfani da shi maimakon Cabinet?
feedback.copy2Q2Hint: Kowace kayan aiki, manhaja, ko takarda, har ma da alkalami da takarda.
feedback.copy6Lead: Ka dawo, kuma wannan shine alamar da ta fi muhimmanci. Ina so in ji game da matsalolin kafin ka manta da su.
feedback.copy6Q1: Mene ne kake ƙoƙarin yi a Cabinet yau?
feedback.copy6Q2: Mene ne abu ɗaya da ya kusan sa ka daina amfani da Cabinet wannan makon?
feedback.copy6Q2Hint: Abin da ya fi damun ka. Ka bayyana dalla-dalla. "X ya ruɗe ni" ya fi "UX".

home.composerDaemonDown: Wakilin daemon a kashe — sake farawa don aikawa

welcome.paragraph: Gidanka naka ne. A cikinsa, za ka shirya dakuna don sassa daban-daban na rayuwarka: aiki, kwakwalwa ta biyu, bincike, iyali. Kuma kowane daki yana da 'cabinets': bayanan ka, fayilolinka, da kuma tawagar AI da ke yin abubuwa a hankali a bango.
welcome.heading: Barka da zuwa <accent>gida</accent>

welcomeBack.heading: Barka da dawowa
welcomeBack.subtitle: Mun sami wani cabinet da ke akwai a nan. Bari mu gama shirya shi.

cabinetCreated.heading: An ƙirƙiri Cabinet ɗinka
cabinetCreated.subtitle: An saita komai kuma a shirye yake.

cloud.alreadyOnList: Tuni kana cikin jerin — za mu tuntuɓe ka.
cloud.aside: Cabinet Cloud na zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba. Samfurin iri ɗaya, ba tare da wahalar saita shi da kanka ba.
cloud.description: Buɗe Cabinet ɗinka daga kowace na'ura yayin da wakilan AI ɗinka ke ci gaba da aiki — rubutawa, bincike, tsarawa — ko da lokacin da aka rufe kwamfutarka.
cloud.error: Wani abu ya faru. Duba imel ɗin kuma sake gwadawa.
cloud.onList: Kana cikin jerin. Za mu aiko maka da imel idan Cabinet Cloud ya buɗe.
cloud.title: Cabinet ɗinka, ko'ina. Ƙungiyar AI ɗinka, koyaushe a kunne.
cloud.waitlistSubtitle: Haɗa daga ko'ina. Ƙungiyar AI ɗinka tana aiki 24/7.

discord.aside: Idan kana son sabbin fasalulluka da farko kuma ka fi son 'mu yi hira' maimakon 'don Allah ka gabatar da tikiti,' wannan shine ɗakinka.
discord.description: Wannan shine inda ra'ayoyi ke zama fasalulluka, hotunan allo ke zama muhawara, kuma wani yakan gano matsalar da ba a zata ba kafin ta same ka.
discord.title: Discord shine wurin abubuwan ban mamaki masu kyau.

github.aside: Cabinet buɗaɗɗen tushe ne. Idan kana son hangen nesa, taimaka mana yaɗa labari.
github.description: Star a GitHub yana taimaka wa mutane da yawa su gano Cabinet kuma su shiga cikin al'umma.
github.title: Taimaka al'ummar Cabinet ta bunƙasa

launch.disclaimerAccess: Wakilai suna aiki da cikakken dama. Cabinet yana amfani da --dangerously-skip-permissions (Claude Code) da kuma makamantan alamomi a sauran masu samarwa. Wannan daidai yake da gudanar da waɗannan kayan aikin CLI daga tashar ku. Duk wani sabar MCP ko kayan aikin da kuka saita za a iya kiran su ta atomatik ta wakilai.
launch.disclaimerBackup: Ajiye bayanan ku akai-akai. Wakilai na iya karantawa, rubutawa, da share fayiloli a cikin KB ɗinku da kuma wuraren ajiya da aka haɗa. Cabinet ba shi da alhakin asarar bayanai. Kai ne ke da alhakin masu samar da AI da ka zaɓa da kuma sharuɗɗan sabis ɗin su.
launch.disclaimerBeta: Software na Beta. Abubuwa na iya lalacewa. Muna fitar da sabbin abubuwa da sauri. Canje-canje masu lalata na iya faruwa ba tare da sanarwa ba.
launch.legalNotice: Ta hanyar ci gaba, kun yarda da <terms>Sharuɗɗanmu</terms> da <privacy>Sirrinmu</privacy>. Cabinet wani <oss>aiki ne na buɗaɗɗen tushe</oss>.

provider.comingSoon: Zai zo nan ba da jimawa ba
provider.heading: Mai samar da wakili
provider.openTerminalDetail: Za ka buƙaci terminal don gudanar da matakai na gaba.
provider.openTerminalError: Ba a iya buɗe terminal ta atomatik ba. Bude terminal ɗin tsarin ku da hannu.
provider.subtitle: Cabinet yana buƙatar AI CLI don ƙarfafa wakilan ku.
provider.verifyExplanation: Tabbatarwa yana gudanar da umarnin mai samarwa ba tare da kai ba daga farko har ƙarshe kuma yana rarraba duk wani gazawa don ku san wane mataki za ku sake dubawa.

roomSetup.subtitle: Don me wannan cabinet yake? Kowane ɗaki yana zuwa da ƙungiyar AI tasa.
roomSetup.heading: Zaɓi <accent>ɗaki</accent>

team.importFailedConnection: Shigo da ya gaza. Duba haɗin ku.
team.subtitle: Kowane cabinet ƙungiyar AI ce — wakilai, ayyuka, da tushen ilimi na haɗin gwiwa, suna aiki tare a matsayin ɗaya.
team.heading: Gina <accent>ƙungiyar</accent> ku

language.title: Harshe
language.description: Yana canza harshe da alkiblar karatu. Shafuka da ke akwai suna riƙe alkiblarsu ta kowane takarda.
language.moreLanguagesHint: Danna kowane don sanar da mu cewa kana son Cabinet a wannan harshen — za mu ba da fifiko ga waɗanda aka fi buƙata.
language.requestSubmitted: Godiya! Mun lura da buƙatarka don {{language}}. Za mu ba da fifiko ga harsunan da aka fi buƙata.
language.requestFailed: Ba a iya kaiwa ga sabar ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa nan da ɗan lokaci.

appearance.title: Kamanni
appearance.matchSystemDescription: Canza kai tsaye da kamannin OS ɗinka.
appearance.sidebarDescription: Saita yadda ake nuna fayiloli a gefen allo.
appearance.showHiddenFilesHint: Nuna fayiloli da manyan fayiloli masu farawa da ɗigo (misali .env, .git)

storage.dataDirectoryDescription: Duk abubuwan da ke cikin Knowledge Base ana adana su a wannan kundin. Canza hanyar yana buƙatar sake farawa.
storage.restartHint: Kundin bayanai zai canza bayan ka sake farawa Cabinet.
storage.envVarHint2: mai canjin yanayi, wanda ke da fifiko akan wannan saitin.

providers.title: Masu bayar da wakilai
providers.troubleshoot: Gyara matsalolin masu bayar da AI
providers.subtitle: Saita masu samar da wakilan AI. Wakilan CLI suna aiki ta hanyar terminal, wakilan API suna amfani da kiran API kai tsaye.
providers.defaultRuntimeHint: Tattaunawa na gabaɗaya da gudu na koma-baya suna amfani da wannan mai bayarwa/samfuri/ƙoƙari.
providers.installedNotLoggedIn: An shigar amma ba a shiga ba
providers.emptyMatrix: Ba a saita masu samarwa ba. Ƙara ɗaya a ƙasa.

notifications.comingSoon: Zai zo nan ba da jimawa ba
notifications.channelsHint: Saita yadda kake karɓar faɗakarwa lokacin da wakilai ke buƙatar hankalinka.
notifications.rulesHint: Ana kunna sanarwa ta atomatik don waɗannan abubuwan:
notifications.previewHint: Sanarwar turawa ta browser, Telegram, Slack, da imel.
notifications.channelPushDesc: Faɗakarwa nan take lokacin da shafin Cabinet ke buɗe ko PWA an shigar.
notifications.channelTelegramDesc: Sanarwar wayar hannu nan take ta hanyar Telegram bot
notifications.channelSlackDesc: Tura faɗakarwa zuwa tashar Slack na tawagarka
notifications.channelEmailDesc: Takaitaccen faɗakarwa da ayyukan wakilai da aka haɗa
notifications.ruleAlertsDesc: Duk wani wakili da ya buga zuwa tashar faɗakarwa
notifications.ruleMentionsDesc: Lokacin da wani wakili ya ambaci @human a kowace tashar
notifications.ruleFloorDesc: Wani buri ya faɗi ƙasa da mafi ƙarancin matakinsa

about.tagline: Tushen ilimi mai zaman kansa na AI-first da OS na farawa.
about.philosophy: Duk abubuwan suna rayuwa a matsayin fayilolin markdown a kan diski. Mutane suna ayyana niyya. Wakilai suna yin aikin. Tushen ilimi shine ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar da aka raba tsakanin duka biyun.
about.privacyBody: Cabinet yana aika binciken amfani mara suna don taimaka mana inganta samfurin. Ba a tattara abubuwan fayil, hanyoyi, umarni, ko sirri ba.
about.telemetryHint: Adadin abubuwan da suka faru, nau'ikan, da bayanan dandamali kawai. Kashe don dakatar da aikawa.
about.cloudBody: Haɗa zuwa Cabinet ɗinka daga ko'ina, yayin da ƙungiyar AI ɗinka ke aiki 24/7 a gare ka. Saka imel ɗinka a ƙasa kuma za mu sanar da kai lokacin da Cabinet Cloud ya buɗe.
about.cloudAlready: Kun riga kun shiga jerin – za mu tuntuɓe ku.
about.cloudSuccess: Kun shiga jerin. Za mu aiko muku da imel lokacin da Cabinet Cloud ya buɗe.
about.cloudError: Wani abu ya faru. Duba imel ɗin kuma sake gwadawa.
about.connectBody: Nemi taimako, raba ra'ayi, ko kawai ka gaishe mu.

profile.title: Furofayil
profile.name: Suna
profile.howAppear: Yadda kake bayyana a tattaunawa da kuma cikin manhajar.
profile.displayNameHint: Ana nunawa a tattaunawa. Tsoho shine Suna.
profile.iconHint: Ana amfani da shi lokacin da babu hoton furofayil. Danna sake don sharewa.
profile.tintHint: Yana ba da launi ga hoton furofayil na madadin lokacin da babu hoto.

workspace.title: Wurin aiki
workspace.name: Sunan wurin aiki
workspace.subtitle: An kama su yayin shiga. Wakilai suna karanta waɗannan lokacin shirya aiki.

sidebar.refreshDescription: Sake Sabunta Sidebar (sake karanta fayil ɗin bayanai)
sidebar.resizeHandle: Canza Girman Sidebar — danna sau biyu don maidawa
sidebar.resetWidth: Danna sau biyu don maidawa faɗi
sidebar.refreshedWithChanges: An sabunta — an ƙara {{added}}, an cire {{removed}}.
sidebar.searchNoResults: Babu fayilolin da suka dace da “{{query}}”

bar.askAiAriaLabel: Tambayi AI ta gyara wannan shafin
bar.askAiPlaceholder: Yaya za a gyara wannan shafin?

server.serverStatusAriaLabel: Matsayin sabar — danna don cikakkun bayanai
server.daemonDownNoProviders: Daemon ba ta amsawa; babu masu samar da wakilai
server.appWorking: Shafuka, edita, bincike, da sarrafa fayiloli suna aiki.
server.appDown: Shafuka, edita, bincike, da adanawa ba su samuwa. Har yanzu za ka iya karanta abubuwan da aka ajiye.
server.daemonWorking: Wakilan AI, ayyukan da aka tsara, da kuma tashar yanar gizo suna aiki.
server.daemonDownDescription: Wakilan AI, ayyukan da aka tsara, da kuma tashar yanar gizo ba su samuwa. Gyaran shafi har yanzu yana aiki.

save.retryTitle: Danna don sake gwada adanawar da ta gaza
save.retryAriaLabel: Adanawa ya gaza — danna don sake gwadawa
save.editing: Ana gyarawa — adanawa kai tsaye zai gudana idan ka dakata
save.wordCountTitle: Adadin kalmomi na wannan shafin (ba tare da tsarin markdown ba)

help.ifUseful: Idan ka ga yana da amfani
help.label: Taimako
help.starsAriaLabel: Taurari {{count}} na GitHub — buɗe Cabinet a GitHub
help.starsTitle: Taurari {{count}} na GitHub — ba Cabinet tauraro a GitHub
help.shareCopied: Kai mai ban mamaki ne, {{name}} 🩷 Na gode da ka kawo membobin Cabinet na gaba. An kwafi hanyar haɗi, je ka raba soyayya!
help.shareFailed: Ba a iya kwafi hanyar haɗi ba

git2.uncommittedFile: Fayil {{count}} wanda ba a ƙaddamar ba
git2.uncommittedFiles: Fayiloli {{count}} waɗanda ba a ƙaddamar ba
git2.uncommittedFilesAria: Fayil(oli) {{count}} waɗanda ba a ƙaddamar ba — danna don ganin jerin
git2.uncommittedFileTip: Danna don ganin fayil ɗin da ba a yi commit ba
git2.uncommittedFilesTip: Danna don ganin fayiloli marasa commit
git2.truncatedHint: An nuna fayiloli {{count}} na farko kawai — gudanar da `git status` don cikakken jerin.
git2.syncTitle: Jawo sabbin abubuwa daga GitHub & wartsake
git2.syncTitleWithLast: Jawo sabbin abubuwa daga GitHub & wartsake. An yi aiki tare na ƙarshe {{when}}.
git2.syncAriaLabel: Jawo sabbin canje-canje daga GitHub kuma wartsake
git2.syncAriaLabelWithLast: Jawo sabbin canje-canje daga GitHub kuma wartsake. An yi aiki tare na ƙarshe {{when}}.

common.openSettings: Bude Saituna don duba sabuntawar da aka shigar

conversation.restartFromOriginal: Sake fara wannan aikin daga asalin umarnin
conversation.markAsDone: Alama wannan aikin a matsayin an gama
conversation.gracefulExit: Rufe CLI a hankali (yana rubuta /exit zuwa PTY)
conversation.sendSigterm: Aika SIGTERM zuwa tsarin PTY mai gudana
conversation.compactContext: Haɗa juyawa na baya zuwa taƙaitaccen bayani don 'yantar da taga mahallin
conversation.sessionEnded: Zaman ya ƙare — rubuta don ci gaba a terminal ɗaya.
conversation.terminalLive: Terminal yana raye. Umarninka na gaba zai jira bayan wannan juyawar ta ƙare.

tour.ariaLabel: Kalli yawon shakatawa na Cabinet ɗinka
tour.starterTask: Mu tattauna manufofina da abin da nake son cimma anan, sannan mu rubuta shi a sabon shafin Bayani.
tour.introSubtitle: Ƙungiyar AI ɗinka. Tushen iliminka. Wuri ɗaya.

taskRail.title: Ayyukan baya-bayan nan da masu gudana

update.restartTitle: Sake kunna Cabinet don kammala sabuntawa
update.description: Cabinet yana bincika sabbin sigogi ta atomatik. Yayin da samfurin ke gwaji, ajiye kwafin bayananka kafin shigar da sabuntawa.

daemon.fixHintElectron: Fita sannan ka sake buɗe Cabinet don sake kunna wakilin daemon.
daemon.fixHintDev: Gudanar da `npm run dev:daemon` (ko sake kunna `npm run dev:all`) don dawo da wakilin daemon.
daemon.willFail: Wakilai, ayyuka, da buƙatun AI za su gaza har sai ya dawo. {{fixHint}}
